channel.title: Ai on Kyle Becker
channel.description: Recent content in Ai on Kyle Becker

item.title: Don't use synthetic personas. Consider an AI research oracle.
item.description:
Don’t use synthetic personas. Consider an AI research oracle.

In my latest quest to automate the things I hate about UX research (the data processing) and spend more time doing the things I love (the interviews, the synthesis) I shifted toward an output question: how should we communicate findings?

In general, this is an organization question: the best way to communicate research findings depends on how your organization or client wants to consume information. Some people like decks. Some people like workshops. My current client likes AI chatbots. So I created Margaret.
